# Copilot Custom Instructions

This repository is a study and discussion space for David J. Chalmers' *The Conscious Mind*.

## `discussion/`

Each file is a collection of questions and arguments raised about a specific topic in the book. Content must come from actual questions asked or arguments made during our discussions — do not add content that was not raised.

## `terminology/`

Each file explains a single concept. Explanations should be as clear as possible, using plain language, tables, diagrams (ASCII or Mermaid), and conceptual models to aid understanding. Avoid vague or overly abstract prose.
